name: Eve Holding, Inc.
summary: Eve Holding, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated aerospace company headquartered in Melbourne, Florida and São Paulo, Brazil, developing Urban Air Mobility (UAM) solutions. Its products include an electric vertical take-off and landing vehicle (eVTOL), TechCare maintenance and support services for eVTOLs, and Vector, an Urban Air Traffic Management system. Eve has approximately 2,700 non-binding vehicle orders valued at ~$14 billion from 28 launch customers and benefits from a strategic relationship with Embraer S.A.
